Server Error in '/' Application.

Compilation Error

Line 244:          jQuery.noConflict();
Line 245:

Line 247:

Line 250:                  width: 1200,
Line 251:                  height: 1000,
Line 252:              });
Line 253:              $(""#EmailDialog"").dialog('open');
Line 254:          });
Line 255:      }
